unit.comment: /* * Distributed under the Boost Software License, Version 1.0. (See accompanying * file LICENSE_1_0.txt or copy at http://www.boost.org/LICENSE_1_0.txt) */

macro.name: TEMPLATE_TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ( "TemplateTest: vectors can be sized and resized", "[vector][template]", int, float, std::string, (std::tuple<int,float>) )

macro.name: TEMPLATE_TEST_CASE_SIG
macro.argument_list: ("TemplateTestSig: vectors can be sized and resized", "[vector][template][nttp]", ((typename TestType, int V), TestType, V), (int,5), (float,4), (std::string,15), ((std::tuple<int, float>), 6))

macro.name: TEMPLATE_PRODUCT_TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ("A Template product test case", "[template][product]", (std::vector, Foo), (int, float))

macro.name: TEMPLATE_PRODUCT_TEST_CASE_SIG
macro.argument_list: ("A Template product test case with array signature", "[template][product][nttp]", ((typename T, size_t S), T, S), (std::array, Bar), ((int, 9), (float, 42)))

macro.name: TEMPLATE_PRODUCT_TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ("Product with differing arities", "[template][product]", std::tuple, (int, (int, double), (int, double, float)))

macro.name: TEMPLATE_LIST_TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ("Template test case with test types specified inside std::tuple", "[template][list]", MyTypes)

macro.name: TEMPLATE_LIST_TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ("Template test case with test types specified inside non-default-constructible std::tuple", "[template][list]", MyNonDefaultConstructibleTypes)

macro.name: TEMPLATE_LIST_TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ("Template test case with test types specified inside non-copyable and non-movable std::tuple", "[template][list]", NonCopyableAndNonMovableTypes)

macro.name: TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ("A couple of nested sections followed by a failure", "[failing][.]")

macro.name: TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ( "toString on const wchar_t const pointer returns the string contents", "[toString]" )

macro.name: TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ( "toString on const wchar_t pointer returns the string contents", "[toString]" )

macro.name: TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ( "toString on wchar_t const pointer returns the string contents", "[toString]" )

macro.name: TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ( "toString on wchar_t returns the string contents", "[toString]" )

macro.name: TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ( "# A test name that starts with a #" )

macro.name: TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ( "#835 -- errno should not be touched by Catch", "[.][failing][!shouldfail]" )

macro.name: TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ( "#961 -- Dynamically created sections should all be reported", "[.]" )

macro.name: TEMPLATE_TEST_CASE_SIG
macro.argument_list: ("#1954 - 7 arg template test case sig compiles", "[regression][.compilation]", ((int Tnx, int Tnu, int Tny, int Tph, int Tch, int Tineq, int Teq), Tnx, Tnu, Tny, Tph, Tch, Tineq, Teq), (1, 1, 1, 1, 1, 0, 0), (5, 1, 1, 1, 1, 0, 0), (5, 3, 1, 1, 1, 0, 0))

macro.name: TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ("Same test name but with different tags is fine", "[.approvals][some-tag]")

macro.name: TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ("Same test name but with different tags is fine", "[.approvals][other-tag]")
